body: PT Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Tbk is allocating IDR 200 billion to repurchase up to 20% of its paid-up capital over a one-year period, aiming to improve investor trust and potentially sell the shares at an optimum value in the future. As of August 2024, the company's shares were recorded at 16.66 billion, with a market capitalization of IDR 3.13 trillion and a share price of IDR 188 per share at the closing bell.
title: Mandiri Herindo Adiperkasa Allocates IDR 200 Billion to Repurchase Up to 20% of Its Paid-Up Capital.

body: PT Kedawung Setia Industrial Tbk is planning a 1:4 stock split, which will increase the number of circulating shares from 405 million to 1.62 billion, and decrease the stock value from IDR 500 to IDR 125 per share, aiming to boost liquidity and make shares more affordable. The plan is set to be decided on October 23, 2024, and if approved, the new value will be applied on November 5 in the regular negotiation market and November 7 in the cash market.
title: PT Kedawung Setia Industrial to Implement 1:4 Stock Split to Increase Liquidity and Affordability

body: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar Tbk's subsidiary, PT Dipo Internasional Pahala Otomotif, has established a new subsidiary called PT Mitdi Teja Otomotif, with Dipo holding 99.99% of the shares worth IDR 155.99 billion. The formation of MTO is intended for business expansion, with the fund source coming from Dipo's internal cash, and is not expected to have a material impact on the company's operational, legal, or financial activities.
title: PT Putra Mandiri Jembar establishes new subsidiary PT Mitdi Teja Otomotif through its subsidiary PT Dipo Internasional Pahala Otomotif.

body: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara Tbk has partnered with PT ITC Nusantara Utilitas to develop a gas network in the tourism sector, aiming to construct gas networks in areas such as Mandalika Special Economic Zone and Golo Mori SEZ. As of H1 2024, PGAS has reached 3,154 industrial and commercial users, 2,017 small-scale users, and 816,063 household users, with opportunities in tourism SEZs expected to increase the number of natural gas users and help penetrate new regions.
title: PT Perusahaan Gas Negara collaborates with PT ITC Nusantara Utilitas to develop gas network in tourism sector.

body: Living Lab Ventures (LLV), a corporate venture capital under Sinar Mas Land, has partnered with the Government of New South Wales, Australia, to introduce an international landing pad, aiming to boost startups from both countries and facilitate global expansion, with a focus on digital, education, and medical sectors. LLV plans to bring three Australian companies to Indonesia in 2024, filling capability gaps and creating job vacancies, while also supporting companies from NSW looking to enter the Indonesian market.
title: Living Lab Ventures partners with New South Wales government to launch international landing pad, boosting startup expansion between Indonesia and Australia.

body: Several major investors, including Ruhong Holding Pte Ltd and PT Sinar Mas Multiartha TBK, reduced their share portions in various companies, such as PT Binao and PT Elnusa TBK, resulting in decreased ownership percentages. Meanwhile, other investors, including Haiyanto and PT Fersindo Nusa Jaya, increased their stakes in companies like PT Omni Inovasi Indonesia TBK and PT Maharaksa Biru Energi TBK, respectively, through share purchases.
title: Multiple investors adjust their shareholdings in various Indonesian companies.
